title: YEAUPE Shower Head with Filter,Powerful Flow Shower Heads High Pressure 6 Modes Pressure Boosting Handheld Showerhead for Low Water Pressure Electric Shower Head,Chrome
features: Large Shower Head:The pressure shower head diameter is 110 mm,improve the area of coverage so you could enjoy the shower experience.It is ideal for quick and thorough rinsing of shampoo

High Pressure Shower Head : The shower head uses air pressurization which greatly improves the pressure, perfect for low water pressure. There is a restrictor valve on the shower, which can be installed or removed according to your water pressure. After removal, the water flow speed and water pressure can be increased

High Quality and Durable Shower Heads: The handheld shower heads is made of high grade plastics and chrome polishing,lightweight,durable,anti-corrosion and no fade.Widely used in home, hotel, gym, fitness center, etc

Showerhead with 6 Modes: This replacement adjustable electric shower head has 6 modes,rain,rain+massage,massage. After a tiring day, you can choose the massage mode to let you relax with a hot shower.Easily changed the modes by the button
description: Transform your daily shower into a refreshing spa experience with the YEAUPE Filtered Shower Head. Designed for homes with hard water, this shower head effectively removes chlorine, heavy metals, rust, and unpleasant odours, providing you with cleaner, softer water for healthier skin and shinier hair. The advanced multi-layer filtration system restores your water’s natural balance while maintaining strong water pressure. It’s ideal for sensitive skin and helps reduce dryness, frizz, and irritation. The built-in filter cartridge is easy to replace, ensuring long-lasting performance and effortless maintenance. Crafted from high-quality ABS material with a chrome finish, this shower head combines durability with sleek modern style. Universal G1/2” connection fits most standard shower hoses and can be installed in minutes — no tools required. Enjoy smoother skin, softer hair, and a more invigorating shower every day with YEAUPE .
